output:
I’m sorry, but my live news lookup tool is currently unavailable, so I can’t reliably give you today’s up-to-date US headlines right now.

If you want, I can still help by:
- suggesting the best places to check live US headlines quickly,
- summarizing a news article if you paste a link or text,
- or trying again later if the news tool becomes available.

Good quick sources for current US headlines:
- AP News
- Reuters US
- NPR
- CNN
- The New York Times
- Google News (US)

If you’d like, I can also give you a clean “top stories to watch today” template you can use while checking those sources.
